comment: Curated catalogue of shipped DPE tools.
url + sha256 fields are populated by CI on release tags. Until then
they may be empty; `dpe install <name>` prints an install hint
without fetching when URL is absent.

scan-fs.description: Filesystem scanner -- emits file / dir envelopes with optional hashing

read-file-stream.description: Stream envelopes from NDJSON / CSV / lines files

write-file-stream.description: Append envelopes to files with LRU handle pool

write-file-stream-hashed.description: Write-file with per-file content hash deduplication

normalize.description: Row-level normaliser (dict / parse / rename / compute / template / require / to_object; profile dispatch)

gate.description: Stateful pass-through publishing progress; pair with checkpoint

checkpoint.description: Spool stdin until referenced gate(s) report done
